name: Swiss Cucumber Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Light soy milk or skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté cucumbers, onion, parsley (or dried parsley), salt and dill in oil until the vegetables are translucent.
2. In a small bowl, whisk arrowroot with water.
3. Pour the whisked mixture into the sauted vegetable mixture and stir over medium heat until thickened.
4. Gradually add soy milk and stir until smooth and creamy. Simmer for 3 minutes.
5. Stir in pepper, ladle into serving bowls, garnish with dill and serve hot.
